# Variants and Configurations

This scenario demonstrates its configurations.

#### Dependency Graph
N/A

#### SBT (build.sbt)

```{.scala include="/demos/sbt-demo/scenario-13-variants/build.sbt" snippet="s13-deps"}
```

#### Expected Intuition
N/A

#### Actual Resolution Results
N/A

#### Classpath Reality
N/A

#### Why This Happens
N/A

#### How Developers Commonly "Fix" This
N/A

#### Safer Ways to Take Control
N/A

#### Signals to Watch For
N/A

#### How This Scales in Real Systems
N/A

#### Key Takeaway
Configurations are powerful.

#### Related Scenarios
N/A
